## Example

```esql
ROW rad = [1.57, 3.14, 4.71]
| EVAL deg = TO_DEGREES(rad)
```

| rad:double | deg:double |
| --- | --- |
| [1.57, 3.14, 4.71] | [89.95437383553924, 179.9087476710785, 269.86312150661774] |
